description_long: This is a vintage gramophone-style record player featuring a large, ornate brass horn with intricate etched patterns, which serves as the sound amplifier. The horn is attached to a dark, polished wooden base with a hexagonal shape, giving the object a classic and elegant appearance. The base houses a black turntable platter, which is glossy and smooth, and a metallic tonearm that curves gracefully over the platter. A winding handle protrudes from the side of the wooden base, indicating manual operation. The overall construction combines wood, metal, and possibly some internal mechanical components, with visible joints and connections between the horn, tonearm, and base. The object exudes an antique charm, suitable for display in urban vintage shops, parks, or themed public spaces.
description: A vintage gramophone record player with a large brass horn, polished wooden base, and a glossy black turntable platter. The design is ornate and classic, evoking early 20th-century style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the brass horn, the curved tonearm, and the hexagonal wooden base with the winding handle visible.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the flared, flower-like opening of the brass horn and the circular black platter beneath.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the horn and tonearm visible, as well as the winding handle on the right side of the wooden base.
description_view_3: Front view directly into the horn, showing the symmetrical shape of the horn and the layout of the base and platter.
attribute_turntable_platter: The turntable platter is present, circular, and glossy black, occupying the central area of the wooden base. It appears smooth and flat, with no visible grooves or markings, and is proportionally smaller than the horn but large enough to hold a standard record.
attribute_tonearm: The tonearm is present, metallic, and curved, extending from the side of the base over the platter. It is medium in length, with a visible joint at the base, and has a metallic finish that matches the horn.
